summary: Frontend-only regression + 3 bug fixes + SEO verification for Akash Puri portfolio (vanilla HTML/CSS/JS in /app/frontend/public/index.html). All 5 verification areas passed on the live REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. No issues found.

notes: String 'Syne' not present anywhere in served HTML.
Google Fonts stylesheet for Fraunces returned HTTP 200 (fetch test).
document.fonts shows Fraunces weights 500/600/700 with status 'loaded'.
Computed font-family on .hero-title: 'Fraunces, "Playfair Display", Georgia, serif'.

seo.title: Akash Puri | Programmatic & Display Advertising Specialist

contact_form.success_note_text: Thanks — your message is queued. I'll be in touch shortly.

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: JSON-LD Person schema uses 'email' with a 'mailto:' prefix — schema.org/Person expects a plain email address (mailto: prefix is valid for ContactPoint.contactType URL but not typical for Person.email). Not blocking; Google's rich-results test still accepts it, but consider changing to 'akashpuri7@gmail.com' without mailto: for stricter compliance.

Minor: Canonical URL points to 'https://akashpuri.com/' while the site is served from the preview subdomain. This is intentional for production SEO but be aware that indexing bots hitting the preview URL will follow the canonical away — desired for prod, but worth confirming.
Info: Contact form is client-side only by design (per problem statement), so no backend integration exists — not flagged.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS portfolio at /app/frontend/public/index.html; React entry (/app/frontend/src/index.js) is neutralized. No data-testid attributes — use semantic selectors (h1, .portrait img, .post-card img, .filter-btn[data-filter=X], #contactForm, section#about|#projects|#skills|#journal|#contact). All bug fixes verified working on live REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs to root-cause; all three reported fixes verified on the live site.
